languages.text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.
languages.original_text: Мы сорвались вниз, в бесконечно долгое, выворачивающее душу падение. Не в силах противиться ужасу, я закрыл глаза, и сознание оставило меня.

traits.locale_text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.
We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.
We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.

languages.text: 我们朝着深渊直坠而下，仿佛灵魂都脱离了躯壳。我闭上双眼，难以承受这份恐惧，意识随即淹没在黑暗之中。
languages.original_text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.

traits.locale_text: 我们朝着深渊直坠而下，仿佛灵魂都脱离了躯壳。我闭上双眼，难以承受这份恐惧，意识随即淹没在黑暗之中。

languages.text: Nos precipitamos hacia una caída interminable y devastadora. Incapaz de soportar el terror, cerré los ojos y permití que mi conciencia me abandonara.
languages.original_text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.

traits.locale_text: Nos precipitamos hacia una caída interminable y devastadora. Incapaz de soportar el terror, cerré los ojos y permití que mi conciencia me abandonara.

languages.text: Nous plongeâmes dans l'abîme, une chute terrible et infinie. Je fermai les yeux, incapable de supporter la terreur, et je perdis connaissance.
languages.original_text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.

traits.locale_text: Nous plongeâmes dans l'abîme, une chute terrible et infinie. Je fermai les yeux, incapable de supporter la terreur, et je perdis connaissance.

languages.text: Sonsuz, ruh sökücü bir düşüşle aşağıya doğru çakıldık. Dehşete dayanamayarak gözlerimi kapattım. Bilincim beni terk etti.
languages.original_text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.

traits.locale_text: Sonsuz, ruh sökücü bir düşüşle aşağıya doğru çakıldık. Dehşete dayanamayarak gözlerimi kapattım. Bilincim beni terk etti.

languages.text: Wir stürzten in eine schier endlose, seelenzerfetzende Tiefe. Unfähig, den Schrecken zu ertragen, schloss ich die Augen und verlor das Bewusstsein.
languages.original_text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.

traits.locale_text: Wir stürzten in eine schier endlose, seelenzerfetzende Tiefe. Unfähig, den Schrecken zu ertragen, schloss ich die Augen und verlor das Bewusstsein.

languages.text: 無限に続く、魂を抉るような落下。恐怖に耐えられず目を閉じた。意識は消えた。
languages.original_text: We plummeted downward in an infinite, soul-wrenching fall. I closed my eyes, unable to bear the terror, and consciousness fled me.

traits.locale_text: 無限に続く、魂を抉るような落下。恐怖に耐えられず目を閉じた。意識は消えた。
